# KOSDAQ mid-cap candidate universe for H1 test (broaden universe).
# Curated list of well-known KOSDAQ mid/large-caps as of 2025-2026.

# are pruned automatically by the loader.
# Source: pykrx/FDR are broken in 2026; this list is from public knowledge
# of major KOSDAQ150 components.
